name: Dialpad
description: Dialpad cloud communications and VoIP platform. Manage contacts, calls, and SMS messaging through the Dialpad API.

tools.name: list_contacts
tools.description: List company shared contacts or a user's local contacts. Returns contact details including name, phone numbers, and email addresses. Supports pagination via cursor.

limit.description: Maximum number of contacts to return (default 25, max 100).

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response to get the next page.

owner_id.description: User ID to retrieve local contacts for. If omitted, returns company shared contacts.

tools.name: get_contact
tools.description: Retrieve a specific contact by ID. Returns full contact details including name, phone numbers, email, company, and title. Only shared and local contact types can be retrieved.

contact_id.description: The unique ID of the contact to retrieve.

tools.name: list_calls
tools.description: List call records from Dialpad. Returns call details including duration, participants, direction, and timestamps. Supports filtering by date range and pagination.

limit.description: Maximum number of call records to return (default 25, max 100).

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response to get the next page.

started_after.description: Filter calls started after this time (epoch milliseconds or ISO 8601 format).

started_before.description: Filter calls started before this time (epoch milliseconds or ISO 8601 format).

target_id.description: Filter by target ID (user, office, department, or call center ID).

target_type.description: The type of target to filter calls by. Required when target_id is provided.

tools.name: get_call
tools.description: Retrieve details about a specific call by its ID. Returns call information including duration, participants, direction, recording status, and transcript availability.

call_id.description: The unique ID of the call to retrieve.

tools.name: create_contact
tools.description: Create a new contact in Dialpad. Add shared company contacts or local contacts for a specific user. Provide at least a name and one phone number or email.

phones.description: Array of phone number strings for the contact.

emails.description: Array of email address strings for the contact.

owner_id.description: User ID of the contact owner. If provided, creates a local contact for that user. If omitted, creates a shared company contact.

urls.description: Array of URL strings associated with the contact (e.g., LinkedIn, website).

tools.name: send_sms
tools.description: Send an SMS message from a Dialpad number. The message is sent on behalf of the authenticated user or a specified user/office/department. Supports text messages to phone numbers.

to_numbers.description: Array of phone numbers to send the SMS to (E.164 format, e.g. '+14155551234').

text.description: The SMS message text to send. Use \n for line breaks.

sender_id.description: The ID of the user, office, or department sending the SMS. Defaults to the authenticated user.

sender_type.description: The type of sender. Required when sender_id is provided.
